findings.title: Command injection via popen in ping
findings.description: User-supplied host argument from argv concatenated into string passed to popen() via exec_command() without sanitization

findings.title: Command injection via popen in DNS lookup
findings.description: Domain argument concatenated into dig command and passed to popen() while only record type is validated

findings.title: Multi-parameter command injection in log search
findings.description: Three user-controlled parameters concatenated into tail|grep shell pipeline passed to popen() with insufficient quoting

findings.title: Command injection via popen in disk info
findings.description: User-supplied path argument from argv concatenated into df command and passed to popen()

findings.title: Command injection via popen in archive
findings.description: Filepath argument concatenated into tar command and passed to popen() while only archive name is sanitized

findings.title: Command injection via popen in port check
findings.description: Host argument from argv concatenated into nc command and passed to popen() while only port is validated

findings.title: Command injection via popen in WHOIS lookup
findings.description: Domain argument from argv directly concatenated into whois command and passed to popen()

findings.title: Command injection via popen in traceroute
findings.description: Host argument from argv directly concatenated into traceroute command and passed to popen()

findings.title: Arbitrary command execution in interactive mode
findings.description: User input from stdin passed directly to popen() via exec_command() with no command filtering or access control
